name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the DEVOPS ENGINEERS platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is this related to a frustration with the current platform?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other solutions or features have you considered?

## User Story

As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature.
